message:
🌱 Enable selfUpgrade by default for Helm installs (#2330)

* 🐛 Fix install method detection when backend is warming up

The /health endpoint returns 503 during the backend's cluster probe
phase. The one-shot useEffect that fetches install_method would fail
silently, leaving installMethod as 'unknown' instead of 'helm'.

This caused Helm installs to show the "kc-agent required" notice
instead of the Helm-specific self-upgrade hint.

Add retry logic (up to 2 retries with 3s delay) so the frontend
detects the install method even when the backend is still warming up.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Enable selfUpgrade by default for Helm installs

selfUpgrade.enabled was false by default, requiring admins to explicitly
opt-in with --set selfUpgrade.enabled=true. There's no good reason to
disable it by default — the RBAC is narrowly scoped (patch Deployments
in own namespace only) and users expect in-console upgrade to just work.

Changes:
- values.yaml: selfUpgrade.enabled defaults to true
- Update hint text from "Enable" to "Re-enable" for cases where it was
  explicitly disabled

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,10 +170,10 @@ watchdog:
   enabled: true
 
 # Self-upgrade: allow the console to upgrade its own Deployment image tag
-# from the UI. Requires additional RBAC (namespaced Role) to patch Deployments.
-# Default: false (users must run 'helm upgrade' manually).
+# from the UI. Creates a namespaced Role granting patch access to Deployments
+# in the release namespace only.
 selfUpgrade:
-  enabled: false
+  enabled: true
 
 # Additional environment variables
 extraEnv: []

@@ -520,7 +520,7 @@
       "agentRequiredDesc": "Start kc-agent to enable automatic updates",
       "helmDisabled": "Auto-update not available for Helm installs",
       "helmDisabledDesc": "Use 'helm upgrade' to update your cluster deployment",
-      "helmSelfUpgradeHint": "Enable in-console upgrades: helm upgrade --set selfUpgrade.enabled=true",
+      "helmSelfUpgradeHint": "Re-enable in-console upgrades: helm upgrade --set selfUpgrade.enabled=true",
       "helmSelfUpgradeReady": "In-console upgrade available",
       "helmSelfUpgradeDesc": "Self-upgrade is enabled — you can upgrade directly from this page",
       "helmUpgradeNow": "Upgrade to {{tag}}",
